title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAYAMBANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CARUNGAY ANNEX, IN BARANGAY CARUNGAY, MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO MOISES B. REBAMONTAN MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No 18468

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7602, June 03, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAYAMBANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CARUNGAY ANNEX, IN BARANGAY CARUNGAY, MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO MOISES B. REBAMONTAN MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Bayambang National High School, Carungay Annex, in Barangay Carungay, Municipality of Bayambang, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Moises B. Rebamontan Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 18, 1989 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: June 03, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
